name: Maui Super Chunk Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup Apple, Banana (Or Any Kind), diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Let ice cream soften under refrigeration for 1 to 2 hours.
2. In a mixer with paddle, add ice cream on slow speed and quickly mix in all fruit, nuts, and chocolate.
3. Fold in whipped cream and freeze at once.
Makes 4 servings.
